name: Shared Household Expenses Agent
description: AI-powered shared expense tracker and reconciliation agent for families. Tracks medical care expenses, household utilities, and family expenses stored in MongoDB Atlas with Vector Search. Enables natural language queries, settlement calculations, and expense analytics.

skills.name: Semantic Expense Search
skills.description: Search expenses using natural language queries. Supports queries like Papa medical bills, nursing staff costs, Mom hospital expenses, utility bills using MongoDB Atlas Vector Search with Vertex AI embeddings.
examples: Show me all Papa's medical expenses

skills.name: Filter Expenses
skills.description: Get expenses using structured filters by family member, expense owner (DAD/MOM/HOUSEHOLD/FAMILY), date range, category, or amount range.
examples: Show expenses paid by AK in March 2026

skills.name: Category Summary
skills.description: Get expense breakdown by category with totals and percentages. Can filter by expense owner (DAD/MOM/HOUSEHOLD/FAMILY).
examples: Give me a category breakdown of all expenses
What categories does Dad's care fall into?

skills.name: Member Contribution Summary
skills.description: Get expense summary grouped by family member showing who paid how much and their percentage contribution.

skills.name: Period Summary
skills.description: Get expense summary for a specific period (monthly/quarterly/annual) with breakdown by expense owner (DAD/MOM/HOUSEHOLD/FAMILY).
examples: Give me the monthly summary for June 2026

skills.name: Calculate Settlement
skills.description: Calculate who owes whom based on shared expense contributions. Returns net balances and settlement instructions for all family members.

skills.name: Outstanding Balances
skills.description: Get current outstanding balances across all time showing net positions for all family members.

skills.name: Add Transaction
skills.description: Record a new expense transaction manually with automatic Vertex AI embedding generation for semantic search. Supports expense owners: DAD, MOM, HOUSEHOLD, FAMILY.
examples: Add expense: MK paid 5000 to Apollo Pharmacy on 2026-06-08
Record nursing staff payment of 50000 by AK
